title: Core
description:
Want to make your own modpack?
This Template is perfect for you!
body:
![The Name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/074a6061ebc94cb30a21374e2ee1658488d4e866.png)

# CORE MC

Core is a modpack that was made to be an easy, ready to go optimized modpack for you to add on and change how you see fit!

**List of use casses**

- Template for you modpack.

- Good performance modpack to use day-to-day.

- ANYTHING! sky is the limit. <3

This was made by enderghost, and I hope to make more modpacks and i love to hear feedback!

![My logo!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c1141a261208317734d32ccb26e18fd32ea7eb2.png)
give it a try. <3
